CustomField.description: Custom Icon to replace the packaged Off Limit Icon. If this field is populated, the custom icon will be shown everywhere if the Contact is Off Limit. The supported value is relative url to a Salesforce image resource preferably a SVG e.g. /resource/TR1__Lock_icon_svg
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Custom Icon to replace the packaged Off Limit Icon. If this field is populated, the custom icon will be shown everywhere if the Contact is Off Limit. The supported value is relative url to a Salesforce image resource preferably a SVG e.g. /resource/TR1__Lock_icon_svg
CustomField.label: Off Limit Custom Icon
